description: List in Judaeo-Arabic, written with a graphite pencil. The writing method and paleography help date this fragment to the 19th-century. The list names חנין סמען in the heading, perhaps: Ḥanīn Simʿon. Also mentions the name Mosseri.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
